player.narrative: Kie looks mostly stable. KDA is 3.22, win rate is 31.6%, and current rank context is Silver 5. Progress is present but not accelerating enough yet to read as a decisive climb.
flags: Mostly wide queue: visible rank changes may be muted.

comfort.reason: Strong sample, reliable KDA, and stable results.

growth.reason: Promising trend with enough recent reps to keep exploring.
